description: Typed orchestration for self-improving retrieval systems. Deno-first, edge-safe. Three methods: seed, selectNext, ingestOutcome.
rules: Always use TypeScript with explicit types on public APIs
Import from jsr:@semantic-loop/core or mod.ts — named exports only
All scores must be clamped to [0, 1] using clamp()
All interfaces use readonly fields — never mutate state
Use InMemoryStore for testing, SupabaseRpcStore for production
Web-standard APIs only: fetch, Request, Response, crypto.subtle
Engine is stateless — all state lives in the MemoryStore
